# Basic GitLab Server Test

env GOCOVERDIR=$WORK/covdata
mkdir $WORK/covdata

# Test server initialization and basic tool listing
exec timeout 30s go run . <<EOF
{"jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": 1, "method": "initialize", "params": {"protocolVersion": "2024-11-05", "capabilities": {"tools": {}}, "clientInfo": {"name": "test", "version": "1.0"}}}
{"jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": 2, "method": "tools/list", "params": {}}
EOF

stdout '"name": "gitlab-server"'
stdout '"search_repositories"'
stdout '"get_project"'
stdout '"list_issues"'
stdout '"create_issue"'

# Test repository search
exec timeout 30s go run . <<EOF
{"jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": 1, "method": "initialize", "params": {"protocolVersion": "2024-11-05", "capabilities": {"tools": {}}, "clientInfo": {"name": "test", "version": "1.0"}}}
{"jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": 2, "method": "tools/call", "params": {"name": "search_repositories", "arguments": {"query": "test", "limit": 5}}}
EOF

stdout '"query": "test"'
stdout '"limit": 5'
stdout '"results"'
stdout 'project-test'
